arts.ttl: Daniel Farke set to unleash “sharp” Leeds United ace after best period at the club
arts.sum: Leeds United winger Manor Solomon has found consistency incredibly hard to come by since his move to Elland Road from Tottenham, with injuries and fitness an ongoing battle for him to overcome. Out wide, Leeds were very enthused to beat competition for the signature of Manor Solomon on loan from Tottenham, but so far it hasn’t manifested in output that the club were expecting.

arts.ttl: Internal transfer deadline set for Leeds United's January talks ahead of window opening
arts.sum: Tricky away game, crowd against you, decisions not easy to accept. Stop conceding first and early away?

arts.ttl: Tonight's Swansea City transfer news as club respond to links with Leeds United and Rangers target
arts.sum: The latest news from the Swansea.com Stadium

arts.ttl: Archie Gray shares 'worst' moment of his Leeds United career in honest Tottenham confession
arts.sum: Speaking in an interview with Mail+, Gray said: “This year I’ve loads of ups and massive downs, probably the worst in football in losing the play-off final and it’s learning from experiences like that. Gray, who is expected to be involved in tonight's Carabao Cup quarter-final against Manchester United, said he was initially star-struck by Spurs' players because he was so used to seeing them on FIFA.

arts.ttl: Preview: Leeds United vs. Oxford United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Leeds United and Oxford United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: David Prutton predicts Leeds v Oxford
arts.sum: David Prutton has issued his predictions for the latest round of Championship fixtures, including Leeds United’s home clash against Oxford United. David Prutton issues Leeds United v Oxford United prediction
